card.className: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6

input.className: w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-300 px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900

button.className: px-6 py-3 rounded-xl bg-slate-900 text-white font-medium hover:bg-slate-800 transition
